ogTitle: Six Mile Swamp vs Skillion Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Six Mile Swamp and Skillion Flat.
heading: Six Mile Swamp vs Skillion Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Six Mile Swamp, New South Wales and Skillion Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Six Mile Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Skillion Flat (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Six Mile Swamp or Skillion Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Six Mile Swamp has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Skillion Flat scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Six Mile Swamp scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Skillion Flat scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Six Mile Swamp or Skillion Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Six Mile Swamp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
